creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ulrich Spoerlein from comment #3)

For future membership/collaborator changes on GitHub repo's that have existing admins, we should probably assign these issues to those admins, as they have been / were provided with the ability to manage a repositories membership implicitly with those permissions

I've CC'd Peter (grehan@) and John (khb@) on this issue, as both are current admins of that repo
